actionData.text: The balcony gleams with ammunition. But weight has consequence here.
The floor groans beneath your burden. Let go.
Everything you carry was taken from another. I will take it from you.
They count what can never be enough. Every pile is a reminder of what was stolen.
They gave everything and received nothing. The idols demanded more.
The garrison stands ready. Every coin in this vault was bought with blood.
The deepest greed: to own what cannot be owned. Take it. Suffer the weight.
